title: Growing Backlash Over Trump's Anime Use

segments.text: US President Donald Trump is using Japanese anime characters in his social media posts.
segments.translationHint: 美國總統川普在社交媒體貼文中使用日本動漫角色。

segments.text: Many people in Japan are upset about this.
segments.translationHint: 日本許多人對此感到不滿。
keywords: upset /əpˈsɛt/   adj. 心情不好的 v. 使心情不快 n. 不快的情緒

segments.text: Trump posted pictures of famous characters like Naruto, Pikachu, and Yu-Gi-Oh!.
segments.translationHint: 川普發布了包括火影忍者、皮卡丘和遊戲王等知名角色的圖片

segments.text: He even made a video showing himself as Naruto.
segments.translationHint: 甚至製作了一段將自己化身為火影忍者的影片。

segments.text: Almost 20,000 people signed a petition asking him to stop.
segments.translationHint: 近兩萬人簽署請願書，要求他停止這樣的行為。
keywords: petition /pəˈtɪʃ.ən/   n. 請願書或請求 v. 提出請願或要求

segments.text: Fans say these characters teach important lessons about friendship and courage.
segments.translationHint: 粉絲表示這些角色傳達了關於友誼與勇氣的重要課題

segments.text: They think Trump should not use them for politics.
segments.translationHint: 他們認為川普不應將這些角色用於政治目的。

segments.text: The Pokémon Company said Trump did not ask for permission to use their characters.
segments.translationHint: 寶可夢公司表示川普未經許可使用他們的角色。
keywords: permission /pərˈmɪʃ.ən/   n. 允許或許可的狀態。
